items.text:
Actors what would make you work again with a filmmaker who paid you what they could. 
@highlight

topComments.text:
After I had worked for a few years, and I felt I had done enough free work...I came up with a set of rules. For me to work on a project I needed two of them. 
1.  I get paid
2. I Play a character I want reel footage of
3. I get to work with someone I really want to work with. 

Or paying back a favor to someone that helped me out. I will always forgo any rule for that.

items.text:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

For more information and to book, visit: [[https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6MURtkiwi5u3I_SjuOeBAfY7AhWr_i_KdAjMyVqhVAnbPHXVMkLj0S_xAWqA_aem_37e7tl3N7fomzbiT0SDj9A&brid=YWdncwF3oE3PfCy7A0jt9rzAm-C7)]([https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.projekteuropa.org%2Flab%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wH2CMLT7rt0F69kpeSpbP2xb2LbM9OutspDRlsbYsF5bpy77HRxa7r96Lmw_aem_yFDP_eO7ruhhw9vumhF_VA%26brid%3DYWdncwFNOV3hP8jxUEkazqmV3Nih&h=AUBpqUPyU0dHXZTC59jShCXyR0QWcXJG99MbQSIbjO2i38w0UKCKLdUNkBJmWvchtIOHBojgs88hkA9Iza3xjfQcKl3_MHG90oS0yhWAmo4Yw7NHhbQFBzmy-_3-GC5gDK6hcgyyPlROyQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDmrSsYxuTJ93CtqBRxUqmGGyzMN-fumFjddGqenYoCv__WxU-R-rBxBLYUqkVWPEN-oJewkZ5Kg2_gSOJsp9rOvig5IxIXcdjqoRLJY8E3AoyiQpuq5gzN28QMaQQ9cq9-pr7jccDCk_HAPXrMnWqcMCRSWY3QIM6RCgN49Hvp))

Thank you!

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Get your** EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT before May 31st**! 

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

>> **Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** 
>> **Organic Breathing & Image Work**
>> **Kutiyattam Traditional Theatre** (Kerala, India) 
>> **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> **The Actor’s Energy and Presence** 
>> **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷, **Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳, **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰, **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: **Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳, **Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮, **Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮, **Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭** Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text:
🎬 Für unseren Bachelor-Abschlussfilm suchen wir dringend noch einen Schauspieler für eine Vaterrolle, als auch zwei Kleindartseller.

Gedreht wird ein Mystery-Thriller als One-Take (mit Hidden Cuts), inspiriert von „Adolescence“ und „Knives Out“.

👤 Vater von Lennard

•⁠  ⁠männlich, Spielalter 50–60, deutsch

Lennards Vater ist der Stadtpolizist der Kleinstadt: streng, stur, kontrolliert und wenig emotional. Er glaubt an Ordnung und klare Regeln, handelt aber aus dem Wunsch heraus, seine Familie zu beschützen.

👤 Stadtpolizist (Kleindarsteller)

 männlich, Spielalter 35–60, ab 180 cm

📅 Dreh: 28.05. (Nachtdreh, auf den 29.05.)

📍 Erdweg bei Dachau

🍽️ Verpflegung & ggf. Unterkunft vorhanden

💰 Studentenfilm, leider ohne Gage

topComments.text: Bin 34, vielleicht würde es ja passen

items.title: 🎬 Casting Call

items.text:
We are now holding our second round of auditions taking place this Sunday at the arts bar 6-9 to register your interest please email jamesmgactsing@gmail.com with your headshot so we know who to look out for.
What to prepare: a brief monologue lasting 1 minute tops and then we will be workshopping auditions scripts will be provided. 
For those that auditioned today if you do wish to attend again by all means do so or we will be in touch with the outcome thanks again for attending.
This is profit shared.

items.text: Tomorrow - FREE CLASS! (DM to book)

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
📣Christmas Contract; Please tag female singers based in Wiltshire, Somerset, Hampshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire & Oxfordshire. 

🌟Glimmer and Famous are searching for female Musical Theatre/Pop vocalists who can dance for a festive residency at Longleat Forest Center Parcs. 

💫 Rehearsals to be held in Warwickshire for 3 days on the 2nd 3rd & 4th November 2026. Accommodation provided.  

💫 The first day on-site is the 8th of November for staging, run-throughs and first performance. (Times TBC) 

💫 Additional performance dates are as follows . 10th, 15th, 17th, 22nd, 24th & 29th November. 1st, 6th, 8th 13th, 15th, 20th, 22nd & 24th Dec.(Times TBC) 

* Fees are above equity minimum and we are searching for drivers and non drivers to share travel. 

* We are keen to see submissions from performers based in the above local locations due to travel budgets. 

* Performers must have an ear for harmonies, star quality, dance experience and the ability to work well within a team. 

* Performers may potentially be asked to submit a self-tape or attend an audition if suitable for the role. Details TBC. 

🌟Email showreels & CV for consideration to entertained@wearefamous.co.uk 

🌟State within the email whereabouts you are based and whether you drive. 

🌟Write in the subject line, ‘Glimmer Vocalist 2026’ 

We look forward to hearing from you 💫 💫💫

📣Please note: If you have already sent your details across then you don’t need to reapply, you are still being considered. 

Many Thanks 

@glimmertrio 💫
@wearefamoushq 🎄

sharedPost.text:
Retour en images sur la création chorégraphique « La Nostalgie », une œuvre qui rend hommage à nos ancêtres, éveille la conscience de la jeunesse pour un avenir meilleur et valorise la culture béninoise, présentée le 16 mai dernier.

Nous adressons nos sincères remerciements à Monsieur Désiré Camille, Président de BougeLabs, ainsi qu’à toute son équipe pour leur accompagnement, leur confiance et leur soutien dans la réalisation de ce projet.

Nos félicitations vont également aux membres de WÀ NYILÓ culture BÉNIN .
Pour une grande majorité d’entre eux, cette création marquait une première expérience sur scène. Malgré les défis et le chemin qu’il reste à parcourir, leur engagement, leur courage et leur détermination méritent d’être salués.

Nous remercions chaleureusement toutes les personnes qui ont cru en notre vision et qui continuent de nous soutenir.

Cette étape marque le début d’une belle aventure artistique et humaine.

Fiers de notre identité.
ACAKPO Bignon

Dannon Dannon

sharedPost.text:
Retour en images sur la création chorégraphique « La Nostalgie », une œuvre qui rend hommage à nos ancêtres, éveille la conscience de la jeunesse pour un avenir meilleur et valorise la culture béninoise, présentée le 16 mai dernier.

Nous adressons nos sincères remerciements à Monsieur Désiré Camille, Président de BougeLabs, ainsi qu’à toute son équipe pour leur accompagnement, leur confiance et leur soutien dans la réalisation de ce projet.

Nos félicitations vont également aux membres de WÀ NYILÓ culture BÉNIN .
Pour une grande majorité d’entre eux, cette création marquait une première expérience sur scène. Malgré les défis et le chemin qu’il reste à parcourir, leur engagement, leur courage et leur détermination méritent d’être salués.

Nous remercions chaleureusement toutes les personnes qui ont cru en notre vision et qui continuent de nous soutenir.

Cette étape marque le début d’une belle aventure artistique et humaine.

Fiers de notre identité.
ACAKPO Bignon

items.text:
Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

Was mich an diesem Format seit Jahren fasziniert, ist die Mischung aus Sprungkraft, Griffkraft, Explosivität, Technik, Ausdauer, Willen und mentaler Stärke. Genau diese Verbindung aus Vorbereitung, Timing, Präzision und Leidenschaft kenne ich aus meiner eigenen Arbeit als Filmproduzent, Kameramann, Regisseur, Cutter, Content Creator, Darsteller und Gründer der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion Köln.

Bei Ninja Warrior Germany zählt nicht nur, wer stark ist. Es zählt, wer im richtigen Augenblick fokussiert bleibt, wer unter Druck klar denkt, wer trotz Risiko sauber entscheidet und wer nach einem Fehler wieder aufsteht. Genau diese Haltung verbindet Sport, Show, Film, Bühne, Social Media und echte Produktionserfahrung.

Ich wünsche allen Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmern eine starke Staffel, faire Runs, unvergessliche Bilder und den Mut, sich selbst genau dann zu übertreffen, wenn alle hinschauen.

Und allen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern wünsche ich viel Freude, Spannung, Gänsehaut und diesen besonderen Moment, wenn man vor dem Bildschirm mitfiebert, obwohl man selbst gar nicht am Parcours hängt.

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#NinjaWarriorGermany #RTL #RTLStudios #Karrideo #ChristianWeiße

sharedPost.text: Udo Jürgens ... Am ersten Juni findet um 19.30 Uhr die Udo Jürgens Hommage von und mit Burkhard Bauche im Lindenhof Theater in Braunschweig statt. HUMORVOLLER SELBSTERFAHRUNGSTRIP,  VISIONEN FÜR DAS RETZER LAND UND TABUTHEMA STERBEHILFE

Als Kevin James vor dem Altar stehen gelassen wird, beschließt dieser die Hochzeitsreise allein anzutreten. Was als Frust beginnt endet in der Selbstreflexion. Wie spaßig SOLO MIO ist, erzählt Sarah Fuchs.

Ob auch die weiteren Filme wie PASSENGERS, VERFLUCHT NORMAL oder THERAPIE FÜR WIKINGER ein Kinoticket Wert sind, erfahren Sie in unserer Sendung.

Die Doku MACHER:INNEN VON MORGEN handelt von ökologischer Landwirtschaft. Gregor Danzinger erzählt über dessen Entstehung in einem Interview. 

Grünes Licht" (2025) ist ein vielfach beachteter österreichischer Dokumentarfilm. Mit Regisseur Pavel Cuzuioc konnten wir dazu ein Gespräch über den Inhalt und Entstehung  des Films führen. 

Abgerundet wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 27.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Hello everyone! My name is Liam David Malcolm and I'm excited to announce that a team of us are premiering a new, queer play called Broken Boys to the Hen and Chicken Theatre on August 14th - 16th 😄

We're looking to cast one of two leading roles in this play, and want to hear from you 🫵

Hello there, everybody how are you all doing? My name is Sean McLean. I’m an actor a model and a musician.

I’ve been within this industry for almost a decade. I’ve worked all around the world with various different agencies as well as brands campaigns, feature films, Short films and commercials. I’ve walked in London Fashion week on multiple occasions.

I also make and compose music, I just recently had a film producer by one of my songs for their upcoming feature film. 

All of my extensive details are included here on my portfolio links and my Spotlight. 

IG: @seanhmclean

items.text:
CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

---

CHASING SHADOWS (Chasing Shadows) - Pilot Episode

A crime/thriller online tv series that follows Astrid Clarke, an FBI agent torn between her family and her job when her brother joins a dangerous gang.

*LOCATION:*

Peterborough, UK

*CASTING REQUIREMENTS: ALL APPLICANTS HAVE TO BE 18+*

**Simon Clarke: **American accent. Visibly looks late twenties

**Classroom people/Park goers:** Anything goes. Open to all. We will try to fit in some improv discussions, but it will depend on what happens on the day with times.

*DATE & TIME:*

Current dates are **June 29th - July 1st**, but you would be needed for only one day, dependant on which character you are chosen for.

*PAYMENT & EXPENSES:*

**Unpaid, **as this is being funded personally. **Travel** will be **covered** **within** the **Peterborough** area **only**. Food is covered.

*CONTACT:*

Either DM me here, or email me at:

hannahlwalker02@hotmail.com

*OTHER IMPORTANT INFO:*

Simon’s character has a specific wardrobe, so Simon will need to be brought on board by June 10th at the VERY latest. June 1st ideally. Other characters by June 10th also, to allow script revision and prep time.

There are some T’s and C’s for Simon, but those can be discussed privately, such as character reappearances.

Thanks!

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – ROMEO AND JULIET (Kathmandu Valley | Lambeth Fringe 2026) 🎭
We are casting local performers based in Nepal (Kathmandu Valley) for a bold new stage adaptation of Romeo and Juliet, heading to Lambeth Fringe 2026 (UK).

This is a contemporary, cross-cultural production that reimagines Shakespeare through movement, text, and grounded performance. We are looking for committed, expressive actors who are excited to work collaboratively and bring fresh energy to a classic story.

Roles available:

Romeo, Juliet, Mercutio, Tybalt, Friar Laurence, Nurse, and ensemble performers.

Location: Kathmandu Valley (rehearsals)

Festival: Lambeth Fringe 2026, London (UK tour)

Eligibility: Open to Nepal-based performers only

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and a short self-tape (1–2 minutes introducing yourself and/or performing Shakespeare) to:

yuensunyeefilms@gmail.com

Subject line: R&J Casting – [Your Name] – Role Applying For

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted with audition details.

A timeless story, retold from Kathmandu to London.

items.text:
Looking for a filming location around Los Angeles for upcoming NYFA MFA Producing short film projects.

Does anyone have access to either:

• A therapist office that could be used for a one-day shoot

OR preferably

• A house with a home office that could double as a therapist office, along with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and some type of patio/backyard area.

Ideally looking for a location available for 3 filming days in a row so I can shoot multiple projects the same week:
• Bad at Love
• Love Bots
• Love

(Yes, there is definitely a theme there.)

I should have pitch packet materials available soon, but finding the location first is important so I know which project to focus on for my class production. Only one film is for class, but I am trying to complete multiple projects around the same timeframe. If everything can be filmed together, my school will be able to cover the location insurance.

Please message me if you know of a possible location or someone who might be interested. Thank you!

- LuvLeighAn Clark

Hi everyone! My name is Maayan, I’m a Los Angeles-based actress and a graduate of the Acting for Camera AOS program at AMDA.

I’m currently looking to connect with filmmakers, student directors, photographers, and creatives for upcoming projects, short films, and collaborations.

I’m bilingual (Hebrew/English), comfortable with both dramatic and comedic material, and always excited to work on meaningful and visually interesting projects.

Headshots/reel available upon request — would love to connect!

items.text:
Deadlands — Cinematic Dark Western Orchestra | No Copyright Music | No Content ID
Step into the brutal and lawless world of Deadlands by Didier Junk — a dark cinematic western journey through abandoned frontier towns, burning saloons, violent outlaws, desperate survival and endless deserts filled with fear, panic and bloodshed.

Inspired by the emotional intensity of classic western epics, dark frontier legends and cinematic orchestral storytelling, this soundtrack combines haunting violins, fragile saloon piano, massive percussion, giant orchestral crescendos and monumental “Wall Of Sound” energy.

This is music for:
western filmmakers
dark cinematic creators
cowboy storytelling
outlaw documentaries
crime atmospheres
dramatic trailers
historical western videos
survival scenes
apocalyptic frontier worlds
dust storm cinematic edits

Deadlands transports you into a collapsing frontier where fear rules the desert, criminals control the roads and survival becomes the only law.

This music library is available FREE for creators without Content-ID claims for standard YouTube and social media use.

If you want:
exclusive original tracks
premium cinematic versions
commercial licenses
extended editions
member-only soundtrack collections
direct support for the composer

please consider becoming a channel member of Didier Junk.

Perfect for:
Dark Western • Outlaw Atmosphere • Frontier Horror • Cinematic Tension • Cowboy Drama • Survival Stories • Epic Orchestral Music • Dust Storm Ambience • Historical Cinematic Videos • Wall Of Sound Orchestra

#DarkWestern #CinematicMusic #EpicWestern #OutlawMusic #WesternAtmosphere #CowboyMusic #FrontierMusic #WallOfSound #OrchestralMusic #DarkCinematic #EpicOrchestra #NoCopyrightMusic #FreeToUseMusic #NoContentID #WesternTrailer #DustStorm #FrontierHorror #CinematicTrailer #InstrumentalMusic #DidierJunk

items.summary:
Deadlands — Cinematic Dark Western Orchestra | No Copyright Music | No Content ID
Step into the brutal and lawless world of Deadlands by Didier Junk — a dark cinematic western journey through abandoned frontier towns, burning saloons, violent outlaws, desperate survival and endless deserts filled with fear, panic and bloodshed.

Inspired by the emotional intensity of classic western epics, dark frontier legends and cinematic orchestral storytelling, this soundtrack combines haunting violins, fragile saloon piano, massive percussion, giant orchestral crescendos and monumental “Wall Of Sound” energy.

This is music for:
western filmmakers
dark cinematic creators
cowboy storytelling
outlaw documentaries
crime atmospheres
dramatic trailers
historical western videos
survival scenes
apocalyptic frontier worlds
dust storm cinematic edits

Deadlands transports you into a collapsing frontier where fear rules the desert, criminals control the roads and survival becomes the only law.

This music library is available FREE for creators without Content-ID claims for standard YouTube and social media use.

If you want:
exclusive original tracks
premium cinematic versions
commercial licenses
extended editions
member-only soundtrack collections
direct support for the composer

please consider becoming a channel member of Didier Junk.

Perfect for:
Dark Western • Outlaw Atmosphere • Frontier Horror • Cinematic Tension • Cowboy Drama • Survival Stories • Epic Orchestral Music • Dust Storm Ambience • Historical Cinematic Videos • Wall Of Sound Orchestra

#DarkWestern #CinematicMusic #EpicWestern #OutlawMusic #WesternAtmosphere #CowboyMusic #FrontierMusic #WallOfSound #OrchestralMusic #DarkCinematic #EpicOrchestra #NoCopyrightMusic #FreeToUseMusic #NoContentID #WesternTrailer #DustStorm #FrontierHorror #CinematicTrailer #InstrumentalMusic #DidierJunk

items.text:
CASTING CALL – HOLZ (A FAMILY PARABLE)

Casting actors for HOLZ, an MA directing project and original theatre production exploring themes of family, control, identity, and inherited trauma. This is an emotionally intense, ensemble-driven piece which will be presented at a festival at the Source Theatre in Stratford on 9th July.

THE PROJECT

Trapped together for a single weekend, a fractured family is forced to confront the truths they have spent years avoiding. As buried resentments and painful secrets rise to the surface, the family begins to unravel under the weight of control, legacy, and the pressure of maintaining a “pure” bloodline.

HOLZ explores the emotional and moral cost of preserving deeply rooted traditions within a divided household.

This production contains emotionally heavy subject matter and will involve a demanding rehearsal process. We are looking for committed, collaborative performers willing to engage deeply with the material and ensemble process.

PRODUCTION DETAILS
• MA Directing Project
• Rehearsal Period: 1 Month
• Rehearsals: 3 times per week
• Performance: Stratford Theatre Festival – 9th July
• Deadline to Apply: 10th June
• Compensation: Unpaid (student)

What You’ll Receive:
• Full theatrical production experience
• Professionally filmed material for showreel use
• Opportunity to collaborate within an ensemble-led creative process

ROLES AVAILABLE
(Seeking 2 Lead Actors — Other Roles Already Cast)

MOTHER (35–50)
The architect of the household’s fragile stability. She maintains order through silence and emotional control. Beneath the surface lies a dead marriage, forbidden desires, and a secret capable of destroying the family entirely.

FATHER (35–50)
Lives in a state of soft denial, drifting through life on routine and optimism. Family gives him purpose, and he clings desperately to it. Beneath his attempts to “keep the peace,” he hides a serious diagnosis no one else knows about.

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit:
• Headshot
• CV
• Brief introduction

We look forward to hearing from you.

Für einen Werbedreh in Stuttgart mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft suchen wir noch Komparsen im alter von 12-18 Jahren, Jungen und Mädchen, die gut bis sehr gut Fußball spielen können. 

Das ganze ist leider sehr Spontan und findet bereits morgen statt. 

Bei Interesse bitte direkt 1-2 Fotos mit schicken. 
Vielen Dank und vielleicht bis morgen.

topComments.text: Ich habe dir übrigens schon einmal in den Kommentaren bei einem ähnlichen Beitrag geschrieben, dass man dir leider keine DM schicken kann und auch keine E-Mail-Adresse für Bewerbungen angegeben ist.
Es gibt auch gar kein Hinweis über die Gage?!

items.text:
**012  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy ojca głównej bohaterki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje mężczyzny do roli ojca głównej bohaterki. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miałby od **40 – 45 lat** o rudych włosach i bez zarostu, o określonych parametrach: **obwód w klatce 100- 105, obwód pasa 90/95 cm** i **wzrost: 175 -180** . Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Postać ta będzie nosić mundur polski podporucznika.Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Pojawi się też w retrospekcji bitwy w 1919 roku z Bolszewikami gdzie zostanie ranny w nogę. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem. Scenę wstępnie będziemy realizować na przełomie marca lub kwietnia.

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.summary:
**012  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy ojca głównej bohaterki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje mężczyzny do roli ojca głównej bohaterki. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miałby od **40 – 45 lat** o rudych włosach i bez zarostu, o określonych parametrach: **obwód w klatce 100- 105, obwód pasa 90/95 cm** i **wzrost: 175 -180** . Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Postać ta będzie nosić mundur polski podporucznika.Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Pojawi się też w retrospekcji bitwy w 1919 roku z Bolszewikami gdzie zostanie ranny w nogę. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem. Scenę wstępnie będziemy realizować na przełomie marca lub kwietnia.

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

items.text:
***Looking for a male actor under 4'9" for the leading role in an upcoming high school sports comedy student short film! No prior acting experience necessary.***

**Logline:** When a popular basketball star steals the one thing that made him special, a short-statured outsider joins the team to prove he can out-dunk the tallest kid in school.

**Genre: **Sports Comedy

**Length: **13-17 mins

**Estimated Shoot dates**: Minimum seven days, likely all in November 2026. 

**Location**: Denver or Aurora, CO

If you're interested, kindly email jakewunger@gmail.com with 2-3 pictures of yourself (one full body and one that clearly shows your face, no hat or sunglasses) as well as height measurements, and your resume if you'd like!

items.text:
Apologies for the long post..
My daughter has done a few background things in movies/shows. 

About a month ago, she had a part she was super excited about and practiced a lot for. Although it wasn't a speaking part, it was semi featured. She did one day where they did still shots but the night before her set day, they emailed and asked if she could work on Monday too. I said unfortunately no (because she had state testing at school). They responded by taking away her other set day and saying she was no longer needed. Subsequently, I told them she was really disappointed and it was unprofessional to cancel on her last minute after going all week without washing her hair (as they asked) to fit the part of what they needed. 

I realized they're connected to several other casting pages as they all post for each other and I think maybe that's why she's not getting booked this past month. 

Was I wrong for calling them unprofessional in turn?

Could they possibly be talking to the other agents and saying I called them unprofessional and not to book her because of me?

sharedPost.text:
Retour en images sur la création chorégraphique « La Nostalgie », une œuvre qui rend hommage à nos ancêtres, éveille la conscience de la jeunesse pour un avenir meilleur et valorise la culture béninoise, présentée le 16 mai dernier.

Nous adressons nos sincères remerciements à Monsieur Désiré Camille, Président de BougeLabs, ainsi qu’à toute son équipe pour leur accompagnement, leur confiance et leur soutien dans la réalisation de ce projet.

Nos félicitations vont également aux membres de WÀ NYILÓ culture BÉNIN .
Pour une grande majorité d’entre eux, cette création marquait une première expérience sur scène. Malgré les défis et le chemin qu’il reste à parcourir, leur engagement, leur courage et leur détermination méritent d’être salués.

Nous remercions chaleureusement toutes les personnes qui ont cru en notre vision et qui continuent de nous soutenir.

Cette étape marque le début d’une belle aventure artistique et humaine.

Fiers de notre identité.
ACAKPO Bignon

Dannon Dannon
 #MinistèreDeLaCulture #tourismebenin #eveilspirituel #Haïti Ton Jubilé Fidèl Carlos Gauthier Trésor Honliasso Aliou Guessere Max Earvin Francesca Pesce Kerwin Barrington Fortino Alldm Acakpo CCR International John Smith ADAC Bénin Eric Lazare Acakpo 𝔹𝔼́𝕟𝕚𝕟 ᴛᴏᴜʀɪsᴍᴇ Olowolayemon Omon Oba Alexandra Degenhardt-Zach Celine Viard Claire Turner Reid Visit Ouidah Ouidah ma ville historique Thierry Gourmelen

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — CHARLIE KIRK LOOK ALIKE NEEDED**

Seeking a 31 years old white male actor/model to fill the role of Charlie Kirk for upcoming campus event at UCLA.

NON UNION.

**Talent Specs:**
* Male
* White
* Approx. 31 year old look
* Height: 6'1" and above
* Small, clean-cut face
* Able to reference statistics quickly
* Prior acting/modeling experience preferred but not required

**Project Details:**
* Paid opportunity ($1k for full day plus rehearsal day)
* Professional production environment on college campus
* Location: UCLA main campus

Please submit in comments:
* Recent headshots/photos
* Resume or relevant experience (if available)
* Availability in late August

Submissions posted below will be followed up with via private message.

Looking for reliable, professional talent with strong in-person presence. 

NON UNION.

Angela Boehm Casting is now casting Background EXTRAS for a documentary that is filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from  May 27 - 28th.

**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, but talent will likely only work ONE day.**

Please read carefully below for details!

DETAILS:
Project: Documentary
Filming Location: Cleveland,Ohio Area (MUST WORK LOCAL)
Shoot Date(s): 5/27 & 5/28 (Talent will likely only work ONE day)
BG Extra Rate: $50 FLAT RATE for 2-4 hours of work. (We understand this is a lower rate, but would still like to give anyone interested the opportunity!)

Link to Submit: https://bit.ly/ABCDoc

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SHORT FILM (DALLAS, TX)
Ever met a salesman who could sell you anything in under a minute?
Title: Salesman
Non-Union | Unpaid (Copy & Credit)
Casting for a short indie film shooting in Austin:
Salesman (Male, 30-40)
A confident, quick-talking door-to-door salesman who engages customers and sets up "free quote" appointments. Looking for strong presence, natural charisma, and sharp dialogue delivery.
Note: This is a brief role (~2 minutes of screen time).
Shoot Details:
• Location: Dallas, Tx
• Dates: Flexible in May (based on availability)
To Submit:
Send headshot and reel/portfolio (if available) to
san2cinecreations@gmail.com

items.text:
#harleydavidson #sesjazdjęciowa #motocykl

Hej,

Szukam kogoś, kto ma Harleya i chciałby, żeby jego motocykl wystąpił w sesji zdjęciowej dla Michała Szpaka. :) 

Szczegóły:

Sesja 3.06 - środa - w serwisie motocyklowym lub samochodowym. Zajmie około 4h - godziny do dogadania - poranne lub popołudniowe, jak będzie wygodniej.

Sesja zdjęciowa będzie dla Michała Szpaka, który wystąpi w magazynie.
Michał będzie miał na sobie ubrania z kolekcji, które wpisują się w kulturę motocyklową - właśnie nawiązujące do Harleya.

Magazyn będzie drukowany offline i promowany online.

Wynagrodzenie:
W związku z tym że magazyn tworzymy oddolnie, bez finansowania, niestety nie mogę zaproponować wynagrodzenia finansowego - za to możemy zaprosić Cię na plan, Twój motocykl będzie na fotach, magazyn w formie papierowej będzie dla Ciebie - możemy Cię oznaczyć w social mediach (jeśli sobie życzysz).

Masz motocykl lub znasz kogoś, kto chciałbym wejść w taką przygodę - zapraszam do kontaktu!

Chętnie udzielę szczegółowych informacji na PRIV.

items.text:
⚡️Masz energię, którą pokocha kamera? My mamy casting dla branży energetycznej! ⚡️

! NOWY CASTING ! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ! ENERGETYCZNY PLAN !

STAWKI:
Od 4 do 9 000 zł !!!

Poszukujemy:
Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, całe rodziny oraz osoby, które po prostu mają w sobie autentyczność i swobodę.

ROLE GŁÓWNE:

Para – 30-35 lat

Szukamy zgranego duetu z fajną energią i naturalnością. Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, ale pojedyncze osoby też są ok.

EPIZODY:

Kasjer na stacji paliw– (wiek nieokreślony)- konkretny, spokojny i kompetentny pracownik stacji paliw.

Rodzice 30-35 lat + dziecko (8 miesięcy- 1,5 roku)

Chętnie cała rodzina. Dziecko powinno chodzić lub stawiać pierwsze kroki. Zależy nam na ciepłej, naturalnej relacji i spontaniczności.

Para około 25 lat

Szukamy naturalnej pary z lekkim, niewymuszonym humorem. Pojedyncze osoby również mile widziane.

Przyjaciele na koncercie/studenci – 19-29 lat

Mężczyzna ok. 40-50  lat

Tutaj pan musi lubić psy, dobrze się z nimi komunikować i nie może mieć uczulenia. Miło jeśli ktoś ma swojego psa – poszukujemy kundelka.

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

28.05 -Termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 19.00

03.06 – Recall

11.06 – Przymiarki

15.06 lub 16.06 – Zdjęcia w Warszawie

Link do castingu i opis scenki do nagrania:
unagimedia.pl/casting058/

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 058

Nie zwalniaj- wejdź do gry i zgłoś się już dziś!

items.text:
‼️🎬TRÓJMIASTO 03.06 STATYŚCI
🎬🎬🎬Statyści 20-60 lat (plaża i okolice) 🎬🎬

‼️🎬Agencja Aktorska Abe  Studio poszukuje statystów kobiet i mężczyzn w przedziale wiekowym 20-60 lat na najbliższe plany filmowe do komedii romantycznej realizowanej w Trójmieście

Stawka 120 zł netto płatne po planie .

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać :

-Imię i nazwisko 

-wiek

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

Based in Southern California

items.text:
**KEY GRIP + GRIP TRUCK NEEDED — SHORT FILM (JUNE 18–20)** 

Hey gang! We’re currently looking for an experienced **Key Grip with a Grip Truck** for an upcoming **short film production** shooting **June 18th–20th**.

This project is **SHALOM SALAM: A RECIPE FOR PEACE** — a powerful and uplifting film about connection, humanity, and bridging divides through culture and community.

I’m incredibly proud to be part of this project alongside award-winning filmmakers **Bayou Bennett** and **Daniel Lir** of Dream Team Directors — a directing duo with **80+ international film awards** and over **16 years** of creating visually stunning, emotionally impactful films centered around humanity and connection.

 **Shalom Salam** tells the story of an Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneur who come together through food, technology, and community to inspire peace in a divided world.

 **Project Info:**
https://seedandspark.com/fund/shalom-salam-a-recipe-for-peace#story

**PROJECT DETAILS**
**Position:** Key Grip + Grip Truck
**Shoot Dates:** **June 18–20**
**Project Type:** Short Film
**Rate:** **$800–$900 Per Day** (depending on package/availability)
**Location:** Washington State
**Status:** Non-Union 

We’re looking for someone dependable, collaborative, and comfortable working on an indie narrative set. Grip truck package details and previous work/reel are appreciated when reaching out.

If interested, please send:
• Your experience/resume
• Grip truck package details
• Availability for the shoot dates
• Contact info

 **Contact:**
Henry Galliett
henrygalliett@gmail.com
425-623-5677

Please share with anyone who may be a good fit!

items.text:
Alcohol Commercial Casting London
We are looking for stylish East Asian talents for an alcohol commercial shoot in London.

Chinese, Japanese and Korean talents are all welcome.

• Role

* Male 30+

* Real age must be 25+

* Good presence / stylish vibe preferred (similar to reference images)

* Motorcycle riding skills are a bonus

• Shoot Details

* London shoot

* Shooting window: Half day (4–5 hours) between June 8–12

* Fee: £500 all inclusive (usage included)

Please only apply if you are comfortable portraying alcohol appreciation during filming. Non-alcoholic drinks will be used on set.

Please only apply if you are comfortable with the included usage terms and fee.

Send headshot, spotlight link, showreels to:

[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

---

**酒类广告演员招募**

现招募气质较好的东亚裔演员出演酒类广告（伦敦拍摄）。

华裔、日本、韩国演员均可。

### 角色要求

*30+ 男性

* 真实法定年龄需25+

* 气质好、有质感（参考图风格）

* 会骑摩托加分

### 拍摄信息

* 伦敦拍摄

* 拍摄时间：6月8日–12日之间半天（4–5小时）

* 费用：£500 all inclusive（包含 usage）

请确认能够接受拍摄与酒类相关的表演内容后再申请。现场将使用无酒精饮品进行拍摄。

请确认接受 usage 条款及费用后再申请。

投递邮箱：

[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - LONDON**

We are looking for two people for a music visualiser:

*• Boy (8–13)*
*• Older man (65–85)*

The roles portray the same person at different stages of life, so we're particularly interested in finding people who may share similar features, expressions, or energy.

The film consists of a single, contemplative shot of the pair sitting together on a park bench overlooking a landscape.

No acting experience is necessary.

Paid role. 

Half day shoot in London, early June.

If interested, please send a recent photo, age, and a little bit about yourself via DM or email: oscar@oscarkeys.com

I can also ride horses

I recommend joining a few extra agencies not sure about working dogs.

When you are about to do something great
Fear begins
It haunts you
It creates doubt
It plays with you.
Even so — take a step forward.

No artists.
No crew.
No experience.
"What I had — only this:
Passion. An idea. Confidence."
And the planning to execute it.
Put in the work.
Finally — ready to release my movie.

#reel #tollywood #AndhraPradesh #telugu #shortfilm

items.text:
Actors —

We are currently developing and adapting De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832), South Africa’s first play.

For almost 200 years, these characters and scenes have never truly been brought to life for a modern audience.

Starting this June, we will begin filming vertical storytelling scenes and performances based on the material.

This is an opportunity to:
• become one of the first actors to perform these characters,
• help shape the future adaptation of South Africa’s first play,
• and leave your own interpretation and creative mark on material that has been dormant for generations.

If you want to be part of bringing this forgotten piece of South African theatre history back to life, apply below:

https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

sharedPost.text: Join Boniface Development Lab & Perform Characters & Scenes From De Nieuwe Ridderorde - SA’s 1st Play, Published 1832 #vlytartacting

sharedPost.text:
🎬 ZDJĘCIE DO REKWIZYTU – DO WSPÓŁCZESNEGO SERIALU 🎬  

Do sesji rekwizytowej poszukujemy zdjęcia dojrzałej, ciepłej kobiety w wieku powyżej 60 lat

Zdjęcie zostanie wykorzystane w scenie na okładce magazynu dla kobiet 

💰 Stawka: 40 zł netto  
(płatne przelewem po odesłaniu wypełnionej umowy)

📅 Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:  
23 maja, godz. 20:00  

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „zdjęcie”

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:  
– imię i nazwisko  
– wiek  
– 2 przykładowe zdjęcia (selfie)  

📸 Wymagania do zdjęć:  
– bez osób towarzyszących  
– bez nakryć głowy  
– bez okularów  
– tło dowolne  

⚠️ Osoba wysyłająca zdjęcie musi posiadać pełne prawa do jego wykorzystania.

Zapraszamy! 🎥

items.text:
𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐊𝐄𝐓𝐒 𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐍𝐎𝐖 𝐀𝐕𝐀𝐈𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 –
𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐂𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐌𝐘’𝐒 𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐒 & 𝐅𝐈𝐋𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐊𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝐍𝐄𝐓𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐓

 

Following the incredible turnout and fantastic feedback from our last event, we are thrilled to announce that tickets are now available for the next Marble Academy Actors & Filmmakers Networking Event

 

If you are serious about building your career in the industry, this is an event you do not want to miss.

Networking is one of the most powerful ways to create opportunities, and this event is designed to bring together a wide range of talented industry professionals in one dynamic, welcoming space. From actors and directors to producers and crew, you’ll have the chance to make valuable connections, spark new collaborations, and open doors to future work.

 

𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝?

Because the right conversation can lead to:

Auditions and casting opportunities

Short film collaborations

Paid work and crew placements

Long-term creative partnerships

Whether you are:

an actor looking to raise your profile

a director searching for fresh talent

a producer building your next project

or a crew member looking for new opportunities

 

this event gives you the chance to meet the people who could help shape your next step in the industry.

𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐞: 𝐒𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐲, 𝟐𝟖𝐭𝐡 𝐉𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔

𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐂𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐌𝐘’𝐒 𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐒 & 𝐅𝐈𝐋𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐊𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝐍𝐄𝐓𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐓

 

Following the incredible turnout and fantastic feedback from our last event, we are thrilled to announce that tickets are now available for the next Marble Academy Actors & Filmmakers Networking Event

 

If you are serious about building your career in the industry, this is an event you do not want to miss.

Networking is one of the most powerful ways to create opportunities, and this event is designed to bring together a wide range of talented industry professionals in one dynamic, welcoming space. From actors and directors to producers and crew, you’ll have the chance to make valuable connections, spark new collaborations, and open doors to future work.

 

𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝?

Because the right conversation can lead to:

Auditions and casting opportunities

Short film collaborations

Paid work and crew placements

Long-term creative partnerships

Whether you are:

an actor looking to raise your profile

a director searching for fresh talent

a producer building your next project

or a crew member looking for new opportunities

 

this event gives you the chance to meet the people who could help shape your next step in the industry.

items.text:
Stagebugz Theatre is thrilled to announce **auditions for actors ages 18+ for our upcoming world-premiere production of *****Cryptophasia*****! **

**Audition Information**

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th. 

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)

**Dates**

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed****[ ****HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IZan_G4JGy2t60LuXnOE8it60DEbmZNzfAH0-9jTy4U/edit?usp=sharing)****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals. 

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit. 

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre. *

**Show Synopsis**

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand. 

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Breakdown**

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

 

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

 

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

 

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

 

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

**Production Team**

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

**About Us**

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects. 

For questions or to learn more, visit [[www.stagebugztheatre.com](www.stagebugztheatre.com)](http://www.stagebugztheatre.com) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

items.text:
Hey zusammen :)
ich bin 20 und möchte mich ernsthaft im Schauspiel weiterentwickeln – sowohl im Bereich Theater als auch Film.
Ich habe bereits mit Monologen gearbeitet und erste Vorsprechen-Erfahrung gesammelt, merke aber, dass mir vor allem Praxis, Austausch und Kontakte fehlen.
Deshalb suche ich:
– Leute auf ähnlichem Level zum gemeinsamen Üben (Monologe/Szenen)
– kleine Film- oder Theaterprojekte (auch Low Budget/Studentenprojekte)
– und generell Austausch mit anderen Schauspieler:innen (gern auch etwas erfahrener), z.B. zu Themen wie Einstieg, Agenturen etc.
Mir geht es darum, Erfahrung zu sammeln, besser zu werden und mich Schritt für Schritt in dem Bereich aufzubauen.
Ich bin zuverlässig, motiviert und offen für Neues 🙌
Falls jemand Lust hat, sich auszutauschen oder etwas zusammen zu starten, schreibt mir gern!

topComments.text:
Hey Lia.
Gut zu wissen wäre, wo du ansässig bist. 
Also eher Berlin, Hamburg, München, Köln oder Pusemuckel... 🤭😆

LG und VIEL ERFOLG!

items.groupTitle: Jobangebote und Castings für Darsteller Schauspieler Komparsen Models
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für die regelmäßige Content-Produktion unserer Social-Media-Kanäle suchen wir für **Ende Juni** sympathische Gesichter vor der Kamera! Wir drehen in zwei wunderschönen Hotels an der Ostsee und suchen dafür unterschiedliche Profile (Vorkenntnisse sind nicht notwendig!):

**📍 OPTION 1: **IFA Rügen Hotel & Ferienpark
* **Gesucht:** Familien (optimal 2 Erwachsene und maximal 2 Kinder)
* **Alter:** Eltern zwischen 25 und 45 Jahren, Kinder bis maximal 12 Jahre

**📍 OPTION 2: **IFA Graal-Müritz Hotel, Spa & Tagungen
* **Gesucht:** Ein Paar
* **Alter:** Zwischen 25 und 50 Jahren

🗓️ **Wann?** Ab Ende Juni oder auch in den kommenden Monaten (genaue Termine und Tage stimmen wir individuell ab).

💡 **Ablauf & Setting:** Es gibt einen festen, vorgegebenen Drehplan. Ihr werdet von unserem Produktionsteam professionell und entspannt angeleitet und setzt gemeinsam mit uns schöne Urlaubsszenen im Hotel um (z. B. beim Frühstück, im Wellnessbereich oder am Strand).

Da das Projekt im Rahmen einer Kooperation ohne Geldfluss realisiert wird, bieten wir euch einen tollen Mehrwert:
* **Übernachtung & Verpflegung:** Wir laden euch für den Zeitraum des Drehs zu uns ins jeweilige Hotel ein – für eure Unterkunft sowie die komplette Verpflegung ist selbstverständlich gesorgt!
* **High-End-Material:** Nach dem Dreh stellen wir euch das professionell produzierte und bearbeitete Bild- und Videomaterial (Studio-Qualität) sehr gerne kostenfrei zur Verfügung – eine tolle Erinnerung oder perfekt für die eigene Sedcard / das Portfolio.
* **Erfahrung:** Ein spannender Blick hinter die Kulissen eines professionellen Drehteams.

**Interesse?** Wenn ihr Zeit und Lust auf einen Kurztrip inkl. Shooting an der Ostsee habt, schreibt uns gerne eine Nachricht mit:
1. Für welches Hotel (Rügen oder Graal-Müritz) ihr euch bewerbt
2. Aktuellen Fotos von euch (bzw. eurer Familie) und/oder Proben aus vorherigen Projekten
3. Eurem Alter (bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)(bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)
4. Eurer Verfügbarkeit Ende Juni 

Wir freuen uns auf eure Nachrichten! 📩

No photo description available.

items.title: Hallo zusammen,

items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Party  gesucht /Berlin,
Für ein studentisches Film Projektsuche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Party karaoke Nacht .

In Berlin am 29.05.2026  zwischen 15-18 h 

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet am 29.05  zwischen 15.00 und 18.00 statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. 

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

items.text:
Hallo zusammen!
Mein Name ist Magnus , ich bin 16 Jahre alt und  Schauspieler mit  Erfahrung vor der Kamera und auf der Bühne.

Ich bin aktuell sehr motiviert, mich weiterzuentwickeln, neue Projekte kennenzulernen und mit kreativen Menschen zusammenzuarbeiten und suche nach neuen Rollen.

items.title: Hallo zusammen!

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We are looking for extras for a nightclub scene in Beverly Hills for our independent series **COLD CITY**.

We need men and women, ages 21–45, all ethnicities are welcome.

**Date:** Thursday, May 28
**Call time:** 10:00 AM
**Location:** Beverly Hills
**Outfit:** Nightclub / going-out look, something you would wear to a nice club in Beverly Hills.

This is a small independent production, so we can offer a **$20 gas fee**, food on set, and a chance to be part of our series, meet great people, and have a fun filming experience.

If you’re interested and available, please send me a private message for all the details.

Thank you so much, and have a great day!

items.title: Hi everyone!

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

items.title: Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting.

items.text:
Reposting this so that everyone gets a chance to audition

DEADLINE: June 5th, 2026

CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting last two weekends of September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th)

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

WHO I'M LOOKING FOR:

XANDER, Male, 30s-40s The dad. Big presence, quiet intensity, carries a lot of weight he doesn't talk about. This is a physical role but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time, I want to meet you. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA , Female, 12-15 Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, open to the right person.

LORELEI , Female, 30s Xander's wife. She's got a prosthetic leg, wears a tool belt, and looks like someone who's kept a family alive through sheer will. Small role but she needs to feel real the second she's on screen. Open to everyone.

LILITH , Female, around 7 The little sister. She's got one line and a stuffed rabbit with one eye and she will absolutely steal the scene. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

YOUNG XANDER , Male, 8-11 A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

HELENE & ANORRA , Female, 8-12 each Two girls in the same flashback. They're ahead of Young Xander, picking through debris. Small roles but they help build the world. Open to all.

JACKSON , Male, 50s A farmer and trader who refuses to break even when things get very bad. He's got maybe five minutes of screen time and needs to make you feel everything. Open to all.

ELLEN (Jackson's Wife) , Female, 30s-40s Non-speaking. She died trying to protect her kid. The image says everything. You need to be comfortable with fake blood and staged death. Open to all.

JACKSON'S CHILDREN (x3) , Under 12 Also non-speaking. Same situation, this is heavy material and parents need to know that going in. Open to all.

BIONIC , Male, late 20s-40s The villain. Cybernetic arm, artificial eye, zero mercy. This role needs a separate prosthetic fitting before we shoot, plan for an extra session. If you want to play a genuinely scary person, this is your role. Open to all.

RAZOR , Male, late 20s-40s Bionic's partner and honestly the more terrifying of the two. Full metallic skull prosthetic, razor teeth, moves like something that used to be human. Full face appliance means a fitting session and extra time in the chair on shoot days. If you can commit to that and move like an animal, I want to talk. Open to all.

EXTRAS / BACKGROUND , Various ages Farmers, survivors, colony members. If you just want to be part of it, reach out. Open to all.

Heads up: This film has staged violence, fake blood, and some genuinely dark dramatic moments. Nothing unsafe happens on set, ever, but you should know what you're signing up for. For anyone under 18, a parent or guardian must be on set for the entire time; there are no exceptions.

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]

Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. Experience helps, but it's not what I'm looking for first. A reel is welcome if you have one.

topComments.text:
Interested.. sent you an Email. 
Thanks, 
Sam

LILITH , Female, around 7 The little sister. She's got one line and a stuffed rabbit with one eye and she will absolutely steal the scene. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

YOUNG XANDER , Male, 8-11 A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

HELENE & ANORRA , Female, 8-12 each Two girls in the same flashback. They're ahead of Young Xander, picking through debris. Small roles but they help build the world. Open to all.

JACKSON , Male, 50s A farmer and trader who refuses to break even when things get very bad. He's got maybe five minutes of screen time and needs to make you feel everything. Open to all.

ELLEN (Jackson's Wife) , Female, 30s-40s Non-speaking. She died trying to protect her kid. The image says everything. You need to be comfortable with fake blood and staged death. Open to all.

JACKSON'S CHILDREN (x3) , Under 12 Also non-speaking. Same situation, this is heavy material and parents need to know that going in. Open to all.

BIONIC , Male, late 20s-40s The villain. Cybernetic arm, artificial eye, zero mercy. This role needs a separate prosthetic fitting before we shoot, plan for an extra session. If you want to play a genuinely scary person, this is your role. Open to all.

RAZOR , Male, late 20s-40s Bionic's partner and honestly the more terrifying of the two. Full metallic skull prosthetic, razor teeth, moves like something that used to be human. Full face appliance means a fitting session and extra time in the chair on shoot days. If you can commit to that and move like an animal, I want to talk. Open to all.

EXTRAS / BACKGROUND , Various ages Farmers, survivors, colony members. If you just want to be part of it, reach out. Open to all.

Heads up: This film has staged violence, fake blood, and some genuinely dark dramatic moments. Nothing unsafe happens on set, ever, but you should know what you're signing up for. For anyone under 18, a parent or guardian must be on set for the entire time; there are no exceptions.

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]

Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. Experience helps, but it's not what I'm looking for first. A reel is welcome if you have one.

items.text: Hi guys! Starting this fall, I’ll be splitting my time between LA and Vancouver, Canada. I have a beautiful 1-bedroom apartment in South Vancouver and I’m looking to connect with a female actress in LA who might be interested in occasional apartment swaps (LA/VAN), hosting each other from time to time, or something along those lines. Would love to connect if that sounds like something you’d be into. Thanks so much :) My IG is https://www.instagram.com/iammagalie/

items.text:
Web Series Casting!

TPWM, a light hearted web-series exploring masculinity in America is looking to cast for its first season. 

Who we are:

A group of emerging filmmakers working to bring an exciting Web Series to life and need your help! 

What do we need:

Actors! We have a full season to cast and need humble thespians such as yourself! Since there are a wide array of available roles, we're asking that everyone come in with one comedy and one dramatic monologue. 

When are auditions:

We'll be hosting auditions on Sunday Jun 7th. 

Where will they be:

Location will be emailed to you upon confirmation. 

For anyone who can't make it, we're asking for self tapes to be sent to [theproblemwmseries@gmail.com](mailto:theproblemwmseries@gmail.com)

What we offer:

Free Session with our Headshot Photographer

Food & Bev

In-Kind Creative Services

We are a no-budget production but we want to figure out how to make it work with you! So we're open to negotiate.

Thank you for taking the time. We're excited to get to know you!

topComments.text: Whatever you need I’m down to help
If you could use me, you would have to get me there. I'm willing to cover room and food.

items.text: It’s casting call time!

sharedPost.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL: Be Part of a Story That Changes Eternities! 🚨
Are you ready to use your acting talent for a greater, divine purpose?

Church House Productions is casting for our upcoming powerful episode of The Rapture Chronicles. This isn’t just another film project—it is a visual wake-up call and a ministry tool designed to shake hearts, reach lost souls for Jesus, and open eyes to the distractions and traps of this world that pull people away from God.

We are bringing to life a breathtaking, cinematic illustration of just how fast the Rapture could happen. We need passionate individuals to help us deliver this urgent message!

🎬 ROLES AVAILABLE (Non-Paid Opportunity):
3 Female Leads (Diverse Races)

1 Male Supporting Role

Background Extras (20–30 participants needed to bring the chaotic, pivotal moments to life!)
Incentives: IMDb Credit for speaking roles and End Credits for all participants.
Filming Dates: Detroit, MI. Metro Area in Mid-June 2026.

⚡ "Your role is already written. Will you heed the warning?"
If you have a heart for ministry, a passion for the screen, and want to help us plant seeds of faith that will last for eternity, we want to see your audition!

📩 HOW TO APPLY:
Don't wait—time is of the essence. Email us at churchouseproductions22@gmail.com today to receive full details for video auditions. Please specify the role you are interested in within the email subject line.
Let's use the arts to win souls for the Kingdom. Apply now!

# 📸 **TFP SWIMWEAR / BEACH EDITORIAL SHOOT – ***ZADAR*

Photographer based in Zadar looking for models for a swimwear / beach editorial collaboration (TFP).

**Concept:** natural light, beach lifestyle, natural lighting.

📍 Location: Zadar / nearby beaches
👙 Style: swimwear / summer editorial
📅 Date: 07.06.2016 - 11.06.2026

**You will receive:** edited professional photos for portfolio + tag credits

**Looking for:** beginner or experienced models open to collaboration

DM with photos / Instagram if interested.

@lauramendes_lens

items.text:
***Are you home educating (or thinking about it) but feeling a bit isolated and worried about your child missing out socially? ❤️‍🩹*** ☕️🙋🏻‍♀️
Well we’ve got a lovely little free **WhatsApp chat** for home educating parents and guardians! 💬🫶🏼

✨ It’s a friendly space to **meet like-minded families**, swap ideas, get inspiration, ask questions, and share encouragement ☺️

Whether you’re a seasoned home educator or just exploring the idea, you’re very welcome to join our little community 💛

Let me know if you'd like to be added! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
items.summary:
***Are you home educating (or thinking about it) but feeling a bit isolated and worried about your child missing out socially? ❤️‍🩹*** ☕️🙋🏻‍♀️
Well we’ve got a lovely little free **WhatsApp chat** for home educating parents and guardians! 💬🫶🏼

✨ It’s a friendly space to **meet like-minded families**, swap ideas, get inspiration, ask questions, and share encouragement ☺️

Whether you’re a seasoned home educator or just exploring the idea, you’re very welcome to join our little community 💛

Let me know if you'd like to be added! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee

items.text:
🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of child and text that says '٧- MODEL CASTING CALL 0o a TpapμKop 10 ELSA ELSASTUDIO UDIO KIDSMODEL&ACTORAGENC KYDS MODEL KIDSMODEL & ACTOR AGENCY'

Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

sharedPost.text:
Sesja zdjęciowej dla klienta z branży eventowo - biznesowej! Poszukujemy dzieci:

🔹 Dziewczynki, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/7dade83ff01142b4ae0a848c8c136b88

🔹 Chłopcy, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/46ba1a3b82f24c3db879179f2203a199

📍 Termin zdjęć: 5 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:
Otwarte, śmiałe. Proszę o zdjęcia z uśmiechem, w ruchu, podczas zabawy. Link z wizytówką będzie dodatkowym atutem.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez linki zamieszczone pod nazwą roli. W razie dodatkowych pytań kontakt na: sky.zgloszenie@gmail.com

❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane.

**CASTING CALL**

  We are currently have an amazing opportunity for SA’s and a few actors ( with speaking role’s ) for the next shoot coming up in Chester filming for the 1st of 8 feature films for “The Eight Saga N.E.S.T Project” ( post apocalyptic ) 

 This is unpaid but all will receive an IMDb credit and all will have plenty of time in front of the camera for up to 5 days playing Cannibals filming is a great location.

 Please message me directly ( Simon Hall - Casting Director ) on WhatsApp on 07894943405 and please include a recent head shot ( phone photo is acceptable ), your full name, age & email address and please state how many day/days you are available for on application.

  We are really looking forward to you working with our professional and friendly community.
🎬🎬🎥🎥🤩🤩

items.text: First Class FREE!

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

items.text: Sooooooo... First off, Hello! I'm Ian and came to Boulder for grad school. I've done music videos and short films with stopmotion and live-action. I have a screenplay that I wrote back home and am posting to gauge interest. It's bloody and contains nudity and humor and I have the hitchhiker from TCM's voice acting for a stopmotion satan. The rest is live action. With the network I've built so far I will be be able to get a pretty good sound track for free.  BUT... I can not pay! I'd be aiming for shooting principle photography next summer.

topComments.text: Depending on the days, distance and time commitment; I would enjoy contributing

items.text:
Hello all!

 

One of our actors had to leave our production due to recent health complications. We are currently looking for someone to replace the characters of Egeus/Philostrate. This role will be double cast as it's relatively small scene wise (roughly only in 2.5 scenes)

 

No specific gender or race requirements; would prefer a taller actor 5'8+ but not a dealbreaker if this doesn't apply. This is a community theatre volunteer role; actors and crew are NOT paid.

 

Location: Virginia Highlands, ATL 30306

 

**Current remaining rehearsal schedule **

**-T/Th 7-10pm**

**-Sat 10am-2pm**

**-Wed 6/3  7-10pm**

**-Fri 6/5 6-9pm**

 

**TECH **

**6/6-6/10 (NO Sunday rehearsal)**

 

**SHOWS **

**6/11-6/20**

**Thurs-Sat @8pm**

**Sun & 6/20 @2pm**

 

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit, please email our director/producer at the following

 

Info Renegade Theatre Co. <[info@renegadetheatreco.org](mailto:info@renegadetheatreco.org)>

 

Renegade Theatre <[renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com](mailto:renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com)>

topComments.text: Sweetie, they leave not for health reasons but because they had to work for “money”… gotta drop the “free” stuff when the bills gotta be paid 🤦🏻‍♀️

items.text:
🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨
🚨!!CASTING NOTICE!!🚨

Hello! My name is Reve Hriczko. I'm an independent filmmaker with my own independent film studio called Two Fold Films. We are currently casting for our upcoming 2028 horror film titled "Camp Red Lake." Below I've attached posters detailing all information you could possibly need for your audition as well as the audition form! Filming will be between May-August of 2027 in the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. This is not paid work!! I'm very excited to work more on this project as it's been in the works for 2 years already.

Please share and audition! Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns. You may dm me, comment on this post, or email Twofoldfilmsofficial@gmail.com

We also post a lot on our instagram @twofoldfilmsofficial and you can dm us there as well.

I look forward to seeing everyone's auditions!

https://forms.gle/kUouZ3eddEpaj59w5

A group of lifelong friends return to the caTp they'v loved since childhood Until a masked figure turns their summer fun into a nightmare.'

May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE HOW TO AUDITION Step One: Read through the character descriptions listed on the audition form and in our bio! Step Two: Find a monologue you like that best shows off your abilities! Step Three: Film a self-tape! Step four: Fill out the aud audition form found in our bio and submit your tape! Step five: Wait to hear from us! :)'

Megan Murphy (18) A strict, competitive overachiever and our protagonist's longtime rival. Zachary Windham (18)-A (18) loyal and kind-hearted jock Tiffany Hill (17) bubbly, Bowie-loving girly girl Jay Barnes -A laid-back caTp counselor everyone likes Amanda Smith (18)- Zach's flirty ex-girlfriend who loves creating tension and drama. Andy Zimmerman (16) nerdy and shy magician •Courtney Barclay (17)- An outgoing and kind new girl who people often get the wrong impression of'

items.text:
LOGLINE

A wannabe mobster uses an app to relive — and fix — a past betrayal. But after multiple glitches, he finds himself stuck on app support hold and turns to the dark web for a solution to his clone chaos.

APPS is currently in post-production, and we’re looking for a Sound Mixer to help support the film’s final audio and sound mix. 🎧

Toronto-based preferred. This role will be remote.

This is a self-funded debut project with limited resources. A small honorarium will be provided, and you will receive credit for your work.

If interested, please send a short introduction along with your reel, portfolio, or samples of your work to:
STUDIO2425FILMS@GMAIL.COM

Thank you so much!

  We are currently have an amazing opportunity for SA’s and a few actors ( with speaking role’s ) for the next shoot coming up in Chester filming for the 1st of 8 feature films for “The Eight Saga N.E.S.T Project” ( post apocalyptic ) 

 This is unpaid but all will receive an IMDb credit and all will have plenty of time in front of the camera for up to 5 days playing Cannibals filming is a great location.

  We are really looking forward to you working with our professional and friendly community.

items.text:
*post grzecznościowy*
**Koordynator/ka Biura w spółce produkującej sygnał telewizyjny - umowa na zastępstwo**
Jesteśmy naprawdę zgranym zespołem i poszukujemy do tej roli dobrze zorganizowanej osoby, dla której wspólna praca będzie także przyjemnością. U nas nie doświadczysz mikrozarządzania.

**Poznaj nas**

Naszą wizytówkę znajdziesz tutaj: [https://livepark.pl/](https://livepark.pl/)

Będziesz pracować z zarządem i zespołem liczącym 20-25 osób.

**Oczekiwania kompetencyjne**

1. Bardzo dobra samoorganizacja pracy w ramach powierzonych obowiązków:

- umiejętność priorytetyzacji

- samodzielność i zarządzanie czasem

- dbanie o porządek (w zadaniach i dokumentach)

- przewidywanie i proaktywność

- ‘gospodarskie’ podejście kompleksowego zarządzania biurem

2. Partnerskie podejście do współpracy z zespołem w oparciu o kulturę współodpowiedzialności

3. Elastyczna współpraca z zarządem (np. przygotowywanie raportów, obsługa spotkań i pomoc w bieżących zadaniach administracyjnych)

4. Kultura komunikacji - posługiwanie się poprawną polszczyzną, a językiem angielskim w stopniu komunikatywnym

5. Doświadczenie w pracy o takim profilu w wymiarze nie mniej niż 2 lata

**Warunki zatrudnienia**

• Umowa o pracę (na okres próbny: 1 miesiąc, następnie umowa na zastępstwo – estymacja: do końca 2027). Przewidujemy możliwość współpracy po tym terminie w którymś z projektów wraz z rozwojem firmy.

• Struktura wynagrodzenia: wynagrodzenie zasadnicze w przedziale od 8500 do 9500 zł brutto + kwartalna premia uznaniowa zależna od wyników pracy wg ustalonych kryteriów.

• Praca stacjonarna w siedzibie Spółki w Warszawie w godz. 9-17

**Z czego możesz korzystać**

• Opieka medyczna w firmie Luxmed

• Udział w wydarzeniach, które realizujemy

**Przebieg rekrutacji**

Krok 1: Prześlij odpowiedzi na pytania i CV w kwestionariuszu rekrutacyjnym. Znajdziesz go tu: [https://forms.gle/87k7fKCcut2ipKTu7](https://forms.gle/87k7fKCcut2ipKTu7)

Krok 2: Osoby spełniające nasze kryteria zostaną powiadomione i zaproszone na spotkanie rekrutacyjne w naszej siedzibie.

Krok 3: Rozpoczęcie pracy przez wybraną osobę - najszybciej, jak to możliwe.
